title: Looking for Category Manager at Shadowfax

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
